description_long: This is a full-size keyboard with a rectangular, low-profile body and a standard array of raised keys arranged in straight rows. The surface is uniformly dark, with each keycap slightly protruding above the main chassis, and the keys are evenly spaced. The keyboard appears to be made primarily of plastic, with a matte finish that reduces glare and fingerprints. There are no visible brand markings, cable attachments, or wireless receivers on the exterior. The overall design is minimalist, with no extra buttons, wrist rest, or decorative elements. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for use on desks or workstations in urban environments.
description: A full-size, matte black keyboard with evenly spaced raised keys and a minimalist, unbranded design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full key layout and the uniform, matte black surface.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the low profile and the raised keycaps.
description_view_2: Side profile view emphasizing the thinness and flatness of the keyboard body.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the keycap height and the keyboard's slim form.
